name: Generator inlet box install (30A)
description: Install a 30A exterior generator power inlet box wired to the panel area for portable generator connection.
labor_notes: Exterior box mounting, wall penetration sealing, and 10/3 back to the panel; pairs with an interlock or transfer switch line.

name: Generator inlet box install (50A)
description: Install a 50A exterior generator power inlet box wired to the panel area for larger portable generators.
labor_notes: Same scope as the 30A inlet with heavier 6/3 cable and terminations adding half an hour.

name: Generator interlock kit install
description: Install a mechanical interlock kit on the main panel with a generator back-feed breaker, allowing safe whole-panel generator use.
labor_notes: Kit fitting is panel-brand specific and includes dead-front modification, back-feed breaker, and operation labeling/testing.

name: Manual transfer switch install (6-circuit)
description: Install a 6-circuit manual transfer switch beside the main panel for selected-circuit generator backup.
labor_notes: Each transferred circuit is intercepted and re-routed through the switch — six circuits of careful re-work plus testing under generator power.

name: Manual transfer switch install (10-circuit)
description: Install a 10-circuit manual transfer switch beside the main panel for extended-circuit generator backup.
labor_notes: Ten intercepted circuits push this to a long day; helper time covers panel-side re-work and load testing.

name: Interlock + 30A inlet package (surface run)
description: Complete portable-generator hookup: 30A exterior inlet, interlock kit, back-feed breaker, and surface cable run to the panel.
labor_notes: Bundles the inlet and interlock at a package rate reflecting shared setup; assumes inlet within about 15 ft of the panel.

name: Interlock + 50A inlet package (surface run)
description: Complete portable-generator hookup: 50A exterior inlet, interlock kit, back-feed breaker, and surface cable run to the panel.
labor_notes: The 50A package's heavier cable and terminations add a half hour and a helper hour over the 30A package.

name: Interlock + 50A inlet package (underground run)
description: Portable-generator hookup with the 50A inlet mounted away from the house (pad or fence line), fed by underground conduit.
labor_notes: Adds underground PVC assembly and conductor pull to the 50A package; trench excavation itself is billed via the trench modifier.

name: Remote generator inlet (approx 50 ft exterior conduit)
description: Mount a 50A generator inlet approximately 50 ft from the panel along the exterior in surface conduit, for generator placement away from living areas.
labor_notes: A long exterior EMT run with weatherproof fittings dominates the time; conductor pull needs a second set of hands.

name: Generator hookup startup & load test
description: Commission a completed generator hookup: transfer procedure walkthrough with the homeowner and a live load test.
labor_notes: Live transfer testing with the customer's generator plus a written quick-start card; scheduling depends on the generator being on site and fueled.
